name: GOLFTEC Tulsa
about: GOLFTEC Tulsa is a golf training studio specializing in technology-driven lessons and club fittings. The facility uses advanced motion measurement systems like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-backed swing feedback and improvement strategies. Services include personalized lesson plans, club fitting sessions with certified fitters, and practice memberships that access indoor training bays. The studio caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, with a focus on structured improvement programs.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Certified PGA coaches with personalized improvement plans
Indoor simulator bays for year-round practice
Club fitting services adding 21+ yards average distance
Structured practice memberships with video feedback

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology mentioned for club fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, though bringing your own clubs is recommended for personalized fitting sessions and lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted. The facility does not offer on-site dining or alcohol service.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulator sessions typically take 1.5-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with age-appropriate instruction and equipment.
